metrics.evidence: The account value at the time of termination was approximately $2 billion

no external manager activity in the CRF's fixed income portfolio for November 2025

signals.description: T. Rowe Price terminated as a global public equities manager on November 4, 2025; account value ~$2 billion reallocated to cash.
CVC Capital Partners Globetrotter SCSp funded from rollover capital out of CVC Asia Pacific Fund IV, L.P., not a new capital deployment.
Stonepeak Global Renewables Fund II Co-Investment ($80M) invests alongside Stonepeak Global Renewables Fund II, L.P. ($243.545M) — same GP, same close date.
DIF Infrastructure VIII and DIF Value-Add IV both committed in EUR (€250M each), both managed by CVC DIF Management, both closed November 18, 2025.
All active managers (CVC Capital Partners, BlackRock, Stonepeak Partners, CVC DIF Management) are noted as existing relationships with the CRF.

signals.description: SBCERS PRR 1-year IRR of 8.40% outperformed CPI-U+400bps (6.67%) by 173 bps but underperformed HL NR&I peer benchmark (11.80%) by 340 bps as of June 30, 2025

results.caseName: DCRB — noisy board minutes (should flag weak)

metrics.evidence: No IRR/TVPI/DPI metrics reported in Jan 29 2026 board minutes

signals.description: The January 29, 2026 open board meeting minutes contain no IRR, TVPI, or DPI metrics for private markets or any sub-strategy. Performance data referenced is limited to total fund net returns (calendar year, fiscal year, and 20-year average). Detailed private markets performance metrics would be found in the Investment Committee presentation materials referenced as presented earlier that morning, not included in these minutes.

Chair Gregg noted trustees received a thorough investment update from CIO Patrick Sahm earlier that morning; that presentation likely contains private markets IRR/TVPI/DPI data but is not included in this document.

Two $100M commitments closed: Quantum Energy Partners IX (natural resources, 11/26/2025) and Updata Fund VIII (private equity, 12/5/2025); plus proposed $150M to Fund AN (infrastructure, pending). No performance metrics attached.

results.rejectReason: Corporate financials detected (7 signals, 0 pension). Likely a manager annual report.
